# UC-11.2.21 · SharePoint Online Sharing Link and Invitation Volume

## Description

Aggregating sharing, anonymous link, company link, and invitation operations exposes both legitimate collaboration bursts and risky broad sharing that may violate data residency policies.

## Value

Feeds insider-threat and data-loss programs with a single search correlating multiple SharePoint sharing verbs without waiting for Purview alerts.

## Implementation

Normalize `Operation` names after Microsoft schema updates. Add domain allow lists for partner tenants when correlating `Sharee` fields (if extracted). Pair with DLP (`ms:o365:dlp`) and CASB where available. Alert on unusual actors or operations rarely seen in baseline.

## SPL

```spl
index=o365 sourcetype="ms:o365:management" Workload=SharePoint earliest=-24h
| where match(Operation, "(?i)Sharing|AnonymousLink|CompanyLink|Invitation")
| eval actor=coalesce(UserId, UserPrincipalName, userId, "")
| stats count by Operation, actor
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Stacked bar (Operation × day), table (top actors), pie (operation mix).
